title: anemonastrum obtusilobum subsp. megaphyllum
intro: Anemonastrum obtusilobum subsp. megaphyllum, also known as the Tibetan thimbleberry or Chinese meadow thistle, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including relief from fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, Anemonastrum obtusilobum subsp. megaphyllum is typically used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or dried extracts, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
